prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a nearly black frame. A small TV-channel-style watermark or logo is visible in the lower right, but the rest of the image is not discernible.

It then cuts to a close-up of a white plastic bottle. The label is clearly readable: “Clorox Soft Scrub with Bleach cleanser.” The label is green with large yellow “Soft Scrub” lettering and white “Bleach” lettering.

Next, the commercial shows a close-up of someone cleaning the inside of a white bathtub. A hand holds a purple sponge or cloth and scrubs the tub surface. On-screen text at the bottom reads: “Use only as directed.”

The scene changes to a wider bathroom view. A white clawfoot bathtub sits against blue-green tiled walls beneath a large window. Several cleaning or toiletry bottles are visible near the window ledge or tub area. A long-handled object rests along the tub rim at the left edge of the frame.

The camera then moves to a low angle near the tiled floor, showing the side and feet of the clawfoot bathtub. A Soft Scrub bottle stands on the floor near the tub, and another cylindrical cleaning product container is placed nearby. On-screen text at the bottom reads: “Not all powders are harsh.” The exact label on the cylindrical container is not fully clear in the sampled frame.

Another low-angle shot shows the underside of the bathtub and one claw foot, with the Soft Scrub bottle placed on the tiled floor to the left. The bathroom tiles and tub legs remain prominent.

The final frame is a product-focused shot under the tub: the Soft Scrub with Bleach bottle is centered in front of the clawfoot bathtub. Large white on-screen text across the top reads: “Preferred By Tubs Everywhere.” The lower-right watermark remains visible.
